testcase.name: replays start execution response for same idempotency key

testcase.name: returns 404 when starting execution for missing workflow
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T15:52:27.486+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.start_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.488+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.start_execution status=failure error_type=NotFoundException duration_ms=1 message=Workflow 'missing-workflow' was not found 2026-06-29T15:52:27.511+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] com.taskforge.GlobalExceptionHandler : resource_not_found message=Workflow 'missing-workflow' was not found

testcase.name: replays approval response for same idempotency key
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T15:52:27.545+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.create_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.547+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.create_workflow status=success duration_ms=2 2026-06-29T15:52:27.556+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.start_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.560+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.start_execution status=success duration_ms=3 2026-06-29T15:52:27.570+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.get_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.576+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.get_execution status=success duration_ms=6 2026-06-29T15:52:27.595+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.resolve_approval 2026-06-29T15:52:27.612+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.resolve_approval status=success duration_ms=16 2026-06-29T15:52:27.620+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.resolve_approval 2026-06-29T15:52:27.622+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.resolve_approval status=success duration_ms=1

testcase.name: returns actionable validation errors for unknown task type
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T15:52:27.639+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.create_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.642+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.create_workflow status=failure error_type=ValidationException duration_ms=2 message=Workflow validation failed 2026-06-29T15:52:27.643+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] com.taskforge.GlobalExceptionHandler : workflow_validation_failed error_count=1

testcase.name: rejects idempotency key reuse for different start request
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T15:52:27.660+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.create_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.661+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.create_workflow status=success duration_ms=0 2026-06-29T15:52:27.667+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.create_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.668+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.create_workflow status=success duration_ms=1 2026-06-29T15:52:27.674+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.start_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.677+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.start_execution status=success duration_ms=2 2026-06-29T15:52:27.684+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.start_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.686+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.start_execution status=failure error_type=ConflictException duration_ms=1 message=Idempotency-Key 'start-conflict-34ffc9d6-5063-4475-9988-313ad78149fb' was already used for a different request 2026-06-29T15:52:27.687+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] com.taskforge.GlobalExceptionHandler : request_conflict message=Idempotency-Key 'start-conflict-34ffc9d6-5063-4475-9988-313ad78149fb' was already used for a different request

testcase.name: returns 409 when approval actor does not satisfy required identity
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T15:52:27.706+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.create_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.708+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.create_workflow status=success duration_ms=1 2026-06-29T15:52:27.714+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.start_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.717+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.start_execution status=success duration_ms=2 2026-06-29T15:52:27.722+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.get_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.723+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.get_execution status=success duration_ms=0 2026-06-29T15:52:27.729+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.resolve_approval 2026-06-29T15:52:27.732+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.resolve_approval status=failure error_type=ConflictException duration_ms=2 message=Approval for task 'gate' requires identity 'ops-lead' 2026-06-29T15:52:27.733+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] com.taskforge.GlobalExceptionHandler : request_conflict message=Approval for task 'gate' requires identity 'ops-lead'

testcase.name: creates workflow and retrieves it
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T15:52:27.749+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.create_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.750+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.create_workflow status=success duration_ms=0 2026-06-29T15:52:27.756+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.get_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.757+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.get_workflow status=success duration_ms=0

testcase.name: requires idempotency key for mutating execution endpoints
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T15:52:27.774+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.create_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.775+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.create_workflow status=success duration_ms=0 2026-06-29T15:52:27.782+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.start_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.783+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.start_execution status=failure error_type=IllegalArgumentException duration_ms=0 message=Idempotency-Key header is required for this endpoint 2026-06-29T15:52:27.785+05:30 WARN 2244 --- [ main] com.taskforge.GlobalExceptionHandler : request_validation_failed message=Idempotency-Key header is required for this endpoint

testcase.name: replays cancel response for same idempotency key
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T15:52:27.820+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.create_workflow 2026-06-29T15:52:27.822+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.create_workflow status=success duration_ms=1 2026-06-29T15:52:27.828+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.start_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.831+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.start_execution status=success duration_ms=2 2026-06-29T15:52:27.836+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.get_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.837+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.get_execution status=success duration_ms=0 2026-06-29T15:52:27.847+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.cancel_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.874+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.cancel_execution status=success duration_ms=26 2026-06-29T15:52:27.885+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_started operation=api.cancel_execution 2026-06-29T15:52:27.887+05:30 INFO 2244 --- [ main] c.taskforge.aop.ObservedOperationAspect : operation_completed operation=api.cancel_execution status=success duration_ms=1
